Under the power lines along Royce road.

Green Granny Smith type apple. Fruit is small to medium but easy height to pick with out a ladder. Access: Public.

Tall tree overhanging a short fence has sweet apples… most likely a gala or honey crisp. Bring a pole; few branches can be reached on foot. Great quality.

Park on Keith and take a short walk.

Based on the fruit on the ground and seeing more fruit on this
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Dolgo type crab apples between fenceline and sidewalk Access: Public.

Ground-level and head-level boughs of small to medium-sized berries all along the walking path. Very easily accessible, great for kids. Also a handful of serviceberry trees interspersed through the mulberries. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
